titleStmt.title: SII 9.666: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 666. (A.R. No. 270 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT MUTTIGI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1479, Piṅgaḷa, Kārtika, śu. 11 Maṅgalavāra corresponding to A.D. 1557 November 2 Tuesday, in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya ruling at Vidyānagarī. It records that the agent of the [Mahā]nāyakāchārya Kṛishṇapa-Nāyaka fixed the rate of the tax on sheep payable by the cultivators of the village Muttigi. The record is damaged. The writer was a Sēnabōva of Gobaḷiyabāvi and the engraver Dēmōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracā
maracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhāmūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svasti śrīvijayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśaka
varuṣa 1479 neya piṁgaḷasaṁvatsarada kārtika śu
11 maṁgaḷavāradalū śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadāśivadēvamahārā
yaru vidyānagariyeṁba paṭṭaṇadalū ratnasiṁhāsanā
rūḍharāgi pruthvīrājyaṁgeyivuttaṁ yiralu nāyakācārya kṟuṣṇapanāya
kara kāryake kartarāda bēlūra nāyakarū
muttigeya gauḍuprajegaḷige bevasāyava mā
ḍuvaṁthā vokkalugaḷige varṣa voṁdakke AramanageŪ
gauḍasēnabōvarigeŪ taḷavārageŪ muttigeya voḷagaḷa taṁgehaḷḷiya gauḍa
rige kaṭṭalāgi Ā kṛṣṇapanāyaka grāmavanū sarvamānyavā
gi biṭeU ra sīmeya bevasāyava māḍuvaAvarige gurideṟe
ge mēluguṟi māḍuvaṁthā vokkaliga sarva
mānya yeraḍaneya varuṣake kuṟi 100 mēluguṟiyilla mūraneya varu
ṣake kuṟi 100 ke ga 0 . 10 voṁdu hoṁnu pa 1 kaṁ mēluguṟi yi
llaveṁdu koṭa śāsana yi śāsanada prakāra tappade vāraṇāsiyalu miṁdu kāśiya vi
śvanāthana sanidhiyali nānāsūryyagrahaṇadalli dāna bhūdāna kaṁnyādāna mu
ṁtāda daśadānava māḍidavaru yidake tapidavaru vāraṇāsiyali sahasra gōhatya sahasra
bra(ṁ)hmahatyava māḍidavaru kōṭiyanu koṁdu kuṁbhinarakadali hākidavaru
ślōka . bahubirvasudhā dattaṁ rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmi tasya
tasya yathā phalaṁ .
yi śāsana bareda sēnabōva gobaḷiyabāviya dēmarasara kuvara
sa yi śāsanava tiddida śilpi muttigeya kāṇāciya baḍagi pōcō
jana maga dēvōjanu .
Digital edition of SII 9.666 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
